order: for frozen nonbinary states, prefer any permitted current categorical affirmative burn evidence
otherwise use the sign of frozen Sentinel continuous dNBR only as a weak disclosed direction fallback

review_contract.yes: necessary but insufficient; later reproducibility, source, quality, and event-level leakage gates remain mandatory
review_contract.uncertain: excluded from prototype-label promotion with uncertainty preserved
